Authors: ChonLam Lao, Yanfang Le, Kshiteej Mahajan, Yixi Chen, Wenfei Wu, Aditya Akella, Michael Swift Published In: 18th USENIX Symposium…

frontmatter.title: ATP: In-network Aggregation for Multi-tenant Learning
frontmatter.description: The authors propose Aggregation Transmission Protocol (ATP), a network service that allows switch hardware to support in-network aggregation of distributed deep neural network training gradients.

nodes.excerpt: Authors: Diogo C. Garcia, Ricardo L. de Queiroz Published In: IEEE Transactions on Information Forensics and Security - April 2015 DOI/ISBN…

frontmatter.title: Face-Spoofing 2D-Detection Based on Moiré Pattern Analysis
frontmatter.description: The authors introduce an algorithm to counter against video replay attacks by checking for Moiré patterns in the spoofed face image.

nodes.excerpt: Authors: Shai Avidan, Ariel Shamir Published In: SIGGRAPH ‘07: ACM SIGGRAPH 2007 DOI/ISBN: 10.1145/1275808.1276390 1. Abstract What do we…

frontmatter.title: Seam Carving for Content-Aware Image Resizing
frontmatter.description: The authors resize images by inserting or deleting low energy horizontal/vertical seams. This preserves the features and the content of the image.
